title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMMilitary
description: Military zones and buildings from OpenStreetMap tagged with military=*. This data model is a derivative work based on the OpenStreetMap Wiki, licensed under CC BY-SA 2.0 by OpenStreetMap contributors.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMMilitary

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OpenStreetMap element.

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification of the OSM element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

militaryType.description: Property. The OSM military tag classifying the site. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:military'

operator.description: Property. The organization or branch of service operating the facility.

access.description: Property. Access restrictions for the site. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:access'

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources.
